creator: riggs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Have a look at the comments regarding the Makefile in bug 208053, they apply here as well. Also:
- Why is include pre/post necessary? There are no tests for variables.
- bash is extended with ${PREFIX} while in bug 208053 /usr/bin/env bash is used. Would it make sense to use the same in both ports?

A general remark: If you provide poudriere build logs, your submissions will receive attention quicker.

Could you prepare an updated shar? Thanks in advance.
